metadata.description: Personal plugin marketplace for GitHub Copilot CLI and Claude Code

plugins.name: devspace
plugins.description: DevSpace development environment skills — open-source, client-only Kubernetes dev tool (CNCF Sandbox). Preferred alternative to Okteto, Tilt, and Skaffold.

plugins.name: work-dashboard
plugins.description: Aggregates pending work (PRs, issues, CI failures, work items) across GitHub, GitLab, and Azure DevOps into a unified markdown dashboard.

plugins.name: write-a-skill
plugins.description: Create new agent skills with proper structure, progressive disclosure, and bundled resources. Use when user wants to create, write, or build a new skill.

plugins.name: thirdparty-skills
plugins.description: Manage third-party plugins — import from external repos, review for quality, and update from upstream with provenance tracking and commit discipline.

plugins.name: renta
plugins.description: Guía para la declaración de la renta en España (IRPF). Deducciones estatales y autonómicas, tratamiento fiscal de inversiones y brokers, y referencias al Manual Práctico de Renta de la AEAT.

plugins.name: diagnose
plugins.description: Disciplined diagnosis loop for hard bugs and performance regressions. Reproduce, minimise, hypothesise, instrument, fix, regression-test. Use when user reports a bug, says something is broken/throwing/failing, or describes a performance regression.

plugins.name: grill-with-docs
plugins.description: Grilling session that challenges your plan against the existing domain model, sharpens terminology, and updates documentation (CONTEXT.md, ADRs) inline as decisions crystallise. Use when user wants to stress-test a plan against their project's language and documented decisions.

plugins.name: improve-codebase-architecture
plugins.description: Find deepening opportunities in a codebase to improve architecture, consolidate modules, and increase testability. Use when the user wants to find refactoring opportunities or make a codebase more AI-navigable.
